arts.ttl: Man City vs. Bournemouth: Pep Guardiola's side sent 'party pooper' warning before Kevin De Bruyne's final home game
arts.sum: Man City must be aware of Bournemouth's 'party pooper' status heading into Kevin De Bruyne's final match for the club at the Etihad Stadium on Tuesday, Citizens expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

Manchester City lost the FA Cup final to Crystal Palace on Saturday, and attention turns back to wrapping up a top-five finish. City are a point behind Chelsea, Newcastle and Aston Villa, so need to c...
